content.text: Diagnostic Log and Trace (DLT) is an important feature which enables logging of important information into DLT via UART and INC

content.local_path: _images/China Convergence - Dlt logging/CN Conv PF - DLT logging overview.bmp

items: ERROR - Errors occurring in a module with impact to correct functionality
WARN - Log messages where a correct behavior can not be ensured
INFO - Log messages providing information for better understanding of the internal behavior of a software
DEBUG - Log messages, which are usable only for debugging of a software
VERBOSE - Log messages with the highest communicative level, here all possible states, information and everything else can be logged

content.text: Decision matrix by Cerberus team for DLT logging
